operational_knowledge_units.title: System error definitions are stored in SystemErrorDefinition
operational_knowledge_units.summary: The slide states that SystemErrorDefinition stores the definition of system errors.
observed_evidence: Bullet text: 'SystemErrorDefinition stores the definition of the system errors.'
Slide section/title context: 'Robotics Database / System Error'
operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: Robotics Database system error reference: SystemErrorDefinition stores the definitions of system errors.

operational_knowledge_units.title: SystemActiveErrorModel contains currently active system errors and their attributes
operational_knowledge_units.summary: The slide indicates that SystemActiveErrorModel shows active errors currently in the system, including the error name, area, error code, and description.
observed_evidence: Bullet text: 'The SystemActiveErrorModel shows any active errors that are currently in the system.'
Bullet text: 'The information includes the name, area, and error code as well as a description of the error.'
operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: SystemActiveErrorModel in the Robotics Database shows current active system errors and includes name, area, error code, and description.

operational_knowledge_units.title: Resolved active errors are archived to SystemErrorActivityModel
operational_knowledge_units.summary: The slide describes a lifecycle transition in which an active error, once resolved, is archived to the SystemErrorActivityModel table.
observed_evidence: Bullet text: 'Once an active error is resolved it is archived to the SystemErrorActivityModel table.'
operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: When a system active error is resolved, it is archived from the active error context to the SystemErrorActivityModel table.
